facebook.caption:
POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and almost miss the stairs. Don't.

Zyzu Kafé sits up off the street. 337 people rated it 4.4 stars and most tourists walk straight past. Order something cold. Find a seat. Realize you've been in the wrong cafés this whole trip.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Climbing the stairs at Zyzu Kafé. 337 reviews, 4.4 stars, and somehow always off the radar on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Your new Phu Quoc coffee spot.

instagram.caption:
Walked past the stairs twice. Classic mistake.

Zyzu Kafé. 4.4★, 337 reviews, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Those stairs on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.4 stars waiting at the top. Don't walk past like everyone else.

tiktok.caption: Almost missed it. Stairs off Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.4★ Zyzu Kafé is worth the climb. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocCafe #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
